debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
f : GlobalTheorem.E✝ n → ℝ
fc : ContDiff ℝ 2 f
x y : GlobalTheorem.E✝ n
ε : ℝ
hε : ε > 0
hdiff : failed to pretty print expression (use 'set_option pp.rawOnError true' for raw representation)
mpb : mixed_partials_bounded f x
g₀ : ℝ → GlobalTheorem.E✝ n := GlobalTheorem.interpolator✝ n x y
g : ℝ → ℝ := GlobalTheorem.interpolated✝ n x y f
g' : ℝ → ℝ := GlobalTheorem.interpolated_deriv✝ n x y f
g'' : ℝ → ℝ := GlobalTheorem.interpolated_deriv2✝ n x y f
f_diff : Differentiable ℝ f
g₀_diff : Differentiable ℝ g₀
g_diff : Differentiable ℝ g
g'_diff : Differentiable ℝ g'
g'_cont : Continuous g'
g''_cont : Continuous g''
deriv_g_eq_g' : deriv g = g'
deriv_g'_eq_g'' : deriv g' = g''
int_g'_eq_sub : ∀ (t : ℝ), ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, g' s = g t - g 0
int_g''_eq_sub : ∀ (t : ℝ), ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, g'' s = g' t - g' 0
hobs : g 1 - g 0 = g' 0 + ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, g'' s
⊢ |g' 0| ≤ ε * ∑ i, |nth_partial i f x|

failed_attempts:
unfold g' interpolated_deriv
    simp only [one_smul, sub_zero, zero_smul, add_zero]
    calc |∑ i, (y i - x i) * nth_partial i f x|
        _ ≤ ∑ i, |( y i - x i) * nth_partial i f x| := abs_sum_le_sum_abs _ _
        _ = ∑ i, |y i - x i| * |nth_partial i f x| := by simp_rw [abs_mul]
        _ ≤ ∑ i, ε * |nth_partial i f x| := by
            apply Finset.sum_le_sum
            intro i _
            apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right
            · rw [abs_sub_comm]; exact hdiff i
            · exact abs_nonneg _
        _ = ε * ∑ i, |nth_partial i f x| := by rw [← Finset.mul_sum]

unfold g' interpolated_deriv
    simp only [one_smul, zero_smul, sub_zero, add_zero]
    calc |∑ i, (y i - x i) * nth_partial i f x|
        _ ≤ ∑ i, |((y i - x i) * nth_partial i f x)| := abs_sum_le_sum_abs _ _
        _ = ∑ i, |y i - x i| * |nth_partial i f x| := by congr 1; ext i; exact abs_mul _ _
        _ ≤ ∑ i, ε * |nth_partial i f x| := by
            apply Finset.sum_le_sum; intro i _
            apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right _ (abs_nonneg _)
            rw [abs_sub_comm]; exact hdiff i
        _ = ε * ∑ i, |nth_partial i f x| := by rw [← Finset.mul_sum]

      _ ≤ ∑ i, ε * |nth_partial i f x| := by
          apply Finset.sum_le_sum
          intro i _
          apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right _ (abs_nonneg _)
          rw [abs_sub_comm]
          exact hdiff i
      _ = ε * ∑ i, |nth_partial i f x| := by rw [← Finset.mul_sum]

unfold g' interpolated_deriv
    simp only [one_smul, sub_zero, zero_smul, add_zero]
    calc |∑ i, (y i - x i) * nth_partial i f x|
        _ ≤ ∑ i, |((y i - x i) * nth_partial i f x)| := abs_sum_le_sum_abs _ _
        _ = ∑ i, |(y i - x i)| * |nth_partial i f x| := by simp_rw [abs_mul]
        _ ≤ ∑ i, ε * |nth_partial i f x| := by
          apply Finset.sum_le_sum
          intro i _
          apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right _ (abs_nonneg _)
          rw [abs_sub_comm]
          exact hdiff i
        _ = ε * ∑ i, |nth_partial i f x| := by rw [← Finset.mul_sum]

unfold g' interpolated_deriv
    simp only [one_smul, sub_zero, zero_smul, add_zero]
    calc |∑ i, (y i - x i) * nth_partial i f x|
      _ ≤ ∑ i, |((y i - x i) * nth_partial i f x)| := abs_sum_le_sum_abs _ _
      _ = ∑ i, |(y i - x i)| * |nth_partial i f x| := by simp [abs_mul]
      _ ≤ ∑ i, ε * |nth_partial i f x| := by
          apply Finset.sum_le_sum
          intro i _
          apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right
          · have h := hdiff i
            rw [abs_sub_comm] at h
            exact h
          · exact abs_nonneg _
      _ = ε * ∑ i, |nth_partial i f x| := by rw [← Finset.mul_sum]
